name: The Fukuoka Chuo Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Fukuoka Chuo Bank, Ltd. provides financial services in Japan. The company's deposit products include time deposits and foreign currency deposits; and loan products comprise education, renovation, housing, auto, and apartment loans, as well as real estate secured loans. It also provides mortgage consultation; financing and management consultation; life insurance and non-life insurance; asset management consultation; loan and business consultation; and foreign exchange services. In addition, the company offers debit cards, IC cash cards, and Internet and mobile banking services. It operates through 41 branches. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
